Security policy for reporting and handling security issues in Pallets projects.

# Purpose
The security policy outlines the procedure for reporting security issues in Pallets projects. It instructs users to avoid opening public issues and instead report concerns via email to `security@palletsprojects.com`. The policy emphasizes the importance of providing detailed information, including a minimal reproducible example, to expedite the resolution process. Security patches are applied to the current and previous releases, with older versions considered based on usage and severity. After resolving an issue, a security release is issued, potentially accompanied by a CVE id and a public announcement, with the option to credit the reporter.
